reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Last year, NPRI emissions were not quantified as it was mistakenly assumed that reporting was not required since employee hours at the facility were below the 20,000 hour threshold. 

2021 emissions are currently being calculated, the explanations for reportable emission changes will be updated once they are finished.
